title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills in practice. The video covers Cherny's testing methodology for skill creation, three scaling strategies (agents, hooks, loops), and two underutilized powerful features of Claude Code.
